configs.name: default_reuse_iter1
configs.notes: Reuse the current best HCLA smoke actor as the control inside the ablation sweep.

configs.name: hazard_high_050
configs.notes: Increase explicit exit-risk penalty to see whether stronger long-term pressure helps reward retention.

configs.name: longview_heavy
configs.notes: Increase long-view weight in the long-term target while leaving the actor update unchanged.

configs.name: actor_longterm_strong
configs.notes: Blend more critic signal into the actor and increase page/hazard gating pressure for long-horizon updates.
